creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #26)
> Actually, not. The ports@ address is a redirection address to freebsd-bugs@
> mailing list:
> https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-bugs
Again, not. Looks like, the ports@ address is a redirection address to freebsd-ports-bugs@ mailing list:
https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports-bugs
